---
title: "Your Proposal Title Here"
---

<!-- SYNERGISTIC ACTIVITIES – 1 PAGE MAXIMUM per person (PAPPG II.D.2.h(iv))
     Each senior/key person must provide a document of up to one page
     with up to five distinct examples demonstrating the broader impact
     of their professional and scholarly activities.

     Submit via Research.gov or Grants.gov as part of the senior/key
     personnel documents. Examples include: innovations in teaching,
     broadening participation, community engagement, professional
     service, contributions to science of learning, policy impact. -->

## Synergistic Activities

**Name:** TODO: Your Name\
**ORCID iD:** TODO: 0000-0000-0000-0000\
**Position Title:** TODO: Your Title\
**Primary Organization and Location:** TODO: Your Institution; City, State

# Synergistic Activities

1. TODO: Describe a synergistic activity demonstrating broader impact.

2. TODO: Describe a second activity.

3. TODO: Describe a third activity.

4. TODO: Describe a fourth activity.

5. TODO: Describe a fifth activity.
